prompt: Write a 7-day social content calendar for the openpatent.ai launch. For each day, give: 1 LinkedIn post (150-200 words), 1 Twitter thread (3-5 tweets), 1 Instagram caption (50 words). Topics: Mon=Beta launch, Tue=6-layer explainer, Wed=BFT council explainer, Thu=OTS Bitcoin demo, Fri=IP boutique case study, Sat=sovereign-temple viral post, Sun=weekly reflection. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {calendar:[{day:string, linkedin:string, twitter:[string], instagram:string}]}.
